stem: When the plane took off, the tired passenger ___.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时表示过去某时正在进行的动作。take off 是过去时动作,与之同时进行的背景应用 was sleeping。slept 只表完成动作,弱化过程;has slept 与过去时间点不搭配;is sleeping 是现在进行时。

stem: He suddenly ___ and found the plane high in the sky.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时叙述突发完成动作。句中 suddenly 提示事件节点,用过去式 woke up。wakes up 为一般现在时;was waking up 强调过程不自然;has woken up 不用于此过去叙事。

stem: While the stewardess ___ coffee, he asked where they were.
explanation: 考点:while 引导的背景动作常用过去进行时。主句 asked 是过去时,从句表示当时正在进行,故用 was serving。served 也可表过去但缺少进行语义;serves 和 has served 时态不符。

stem: He ___ so deeply that he missed the whole take-off.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。missed 已提示过去叙事,并列因果动作应保持过去时,故用 slept。sleeps 为现在时;was sleep 结构错误;has sleeping 结构错误。

stem: I ___ (read) a magazine when the pilot made an announcement.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时与一般过去时搭配。announcement 是过去时突发动作,前面背景动作用 was reading。

stem: I asked a stranger for help, and I ___ to a taxi at once.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动语态。主语 I 是被带去出租车,应用 was led。led 为主动;am led 现在时被动;have led 现在完成时主动。

stem: The driver ___ around the city for nearly an hour.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时主动叙事。司机是动作发出者,用 drove me。drives me 为现在时;was driven 主语应是我且语态不符;has driven me 与明确过去场景不符。

stem: At the end of the trip, I ___ to pay 300 pounds.
explanation: 考点:过去时被动语态。句意是“我被要求付款”,应用 was asked。asked 主动语态缺主语逻辑;am asking 现在进行时主动;have asked 现在完成时主动。

stem: Later I realized that I ___ by both men.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。被骗发生在 realized 之前,且主语 I 为受动者,故用 had been cheated。cheated/cheat 主动错误;am cheated 时态不符。

stem: We ___ (take) to the wrong hotel by mistake.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时的被动语态。主语 we 是被带去错误地点,结构为 were + 过去分词,故填 were taken。

stem: She said she ___ only a salad that evening.
explanation: 考点:过去语境中的 be going to。said 为过去时,表示当时打算应用 was going to have。has/is going to have 时态不符;had 只表过去完成不体现打算。

stem: But in the end she ___ a full three-course meal.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时叙事。in the end 表示结果动作已发生,用 ordered。orders 现在时;was ordering 强调过程不自然;has ordered 与过去叙述不符。

stem: She promised she ___ her diet again the next day.
explanation: 考点:过去将来意义。主句 promised 在过去,从句表示“那时看来将要做”,用 would start。starts/is starting 时态不符;started 变成已发生动作。

stem: Yesterday she ___ all day, but at night she broke her plan.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。yesterday all day 为明确过去时间,故用 dieted。diets/is dieting 为现在时;has dieted 不与明确过去时间连用。

stem: I ___ (be going to) order fish, but the steak looked better.
explanation: 考点:过去语境中的打算表达。句意是“本来打算点鱼”,应用 was going to。

stem: The neighbours ___ bags of wool into the room every evening.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时描述过去习惯性动作。句子处于过去叙事场景,用 brought。bring 现在时;have brought 强调到现在的结果;are bringing 为现在进行时。

stem: They ___ three carpets so far this month.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。so far 是完成时标志,强调截至现在已完成数量,故用 have made。made 仅过去;make/are making 与 so far 不搭配。

stem: I ___ their work before I saw the final carpet.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。误解发生在 saw 之前,是“过去的过去”,故用 had misunderstood。其他选项时态均不符。

stem: Since spring, the old couple ___ much busier.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时与 since 连用。since spring 表示从过去延续到现在,应用 have become。became 只表过去;become 缺助动词;are becoming 进行时不如完成时贴切。

stem: She ___ (finish) two new patterns already.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。already 常与现在完成时连用,结构为 has finished。

stem: By the time the workers arrived, the fire ___ many trees.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。destroy 发生在 arrived 之前,是过去的过去,故用 had destroyed。其余时态不能准确表达先后。

stem: He thought the snake was dead because it ___ for a long time.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时否定。蛇不动发生在 thought 之前,应用 had not moved。did not move 无法强调先于 thought;does not move/has not moved 时态不符。

stem: When he threw it on the ground, the snake suddenly ___.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。suddenly 表示过去叙事中的突发动作,用 moved。had moved 会把动作提前到 threw 之前,不符;moves/has moved 时态不符。

stem: Several snakes ___ in the fire before the rain came.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。烧伤发生在雨来之前,且 snakes 为受动者,故用 had been burnt。were burnt 不能突出先后;burn/are burnt 时态不符。

stem: By noon the workers ___ (find) only ash and broken branches.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by noon 作为过去参照点,表示到那时已完成,故填 had found。

stem: The guests ___ nervously when the detective entered the room.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。entered 是过去时节点动作,背景动作应为 were talking。talked 不强调进行背景;are talking/have talked 时态不符。

stem: She said she ___ cakes with syrup all evening.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。端甜点这一持续动作先于 said,并强调持续过程,故用 had been serving。served 不强调持续且先后关系弱;serves 时态不符;was served 语态错误。

stem: The detective ___ every purse while the hostess explained the case.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时与 while。while 从句表示过去进行背景,主句并行动作也可用过去进行时,故选 was searching。其余选项时态不匹配。

stem: I ___ for my keys for half an hour, so my hands are dirty.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。for half an hour + 现在结果 are dirty 表示动作持续到现在并产生结果,故用 have been looking。looked/ had looked 不连到现在;am looking 不体现时长。

stem: They ___ (wait) outside since eight o'clock.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。since eight o'clock 表示从过去持续到现在,故用 have been waiting。

stem: He ___ the same dream for three nights before he broke the chimney.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。做梦发生在 broke 之前,故用 had had。had 是一般过去时;has had/has 为现在相关时态。

stem: After hours of work, they ___ only a rusty box.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时推进主线。句子讲故事结果动作,应用 found。had found 会把动作提前到 another past reference 之前,语境不需要;find/have found 时态不符。

stem: By the time his family arrived, he ___ half the chimney.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。remove 在 arrived 之前完成,故用 had removed。removed 不能明确先后;removes/has removed 时态不符。

stem: Everyone ___ rich, but the coins were only tin.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时与宾语从句时态一致。整个语境是过去叙事,主句 thought,从句也用过去时 was。其他选项时态搭配不当。

stem: Before dawn, he ___ (decide) to open the wall.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。decide 发生在后续过去动作之前,故填 had decided。

stem: The strange noise ___ louder before the pilot turned back.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。噪声变大是 turn back 之前一直持续的过程,故用 had been getting。got 不强调持续;has got/is getting 时态不符。

stem: This aircraft is ___ than sound.
explanation: 考点:比较级。与 than 连用应使用比较级 faster。fast 是原级;fastest 为最高级;more fast 为错误比较形式。

stem: By the time he landed, he ___ the instruments for ten minutes.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。检查动作持续到 landed 之前,并强调持续时长 ten minutes,应用 had been checking。其他选项语态或时态不符。

stem: The second knock was ___ than the first one.
explanation: 考点:比较级。than 要配比较级 louder。loud 为原级;loudest 为最高级;more louder 双重比较错误。

stem: The metal plate ___ (vibrate) for several minutes before the engineer found it.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。for several minutes + before 表示在过去某点前一直持续,故填 had been vibrating。

stem: She blamed ___ for losing her purse in the crowd.
explanation: 考点:反身代词。blame oneself for 是固定结构,表示“责怪自己”,故用 herself。her/she/hers 词性或意义不符合。

stem: The young man ___ her purse and smiled politely.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。故事发生在过去,并列动作 smiled 也是过去式,故用 returned。其余时态不符。

stem: I did the shopping by ___ because no one was free.
explanation: 考点:by oneself 表“独自”。固定搭配是 by myself。me/mine/my 均不能构成该搭配。

stem: When she opened the purse at home, she ___ that it was empty.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。opened 和 was empty 指过去场景,主句用 found。其他选项时态不匹配。

stem: Please help ___ (you) to some coffee.
explanation: 考点:反身代词固定用法。help yourself to... 表“请随便用......”,故填 yourself。

stem: He thought his small shop ___ close forever.
explanation: 考点:过去语境中的将来表达。thought 是过去时,表示“当时以为将会”,用 was going to close。is going to/will 与过去视角不符;has 结构错误。

stem: A large mall ___ nearby a few months later.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。a few months later 在过去叙事中,且 mall 为受动者,故用 was built。is built 现在时;has built/builds 主动语态错误。

stem: She said the new road ___ bring more customers.
explanation: 考点:过去将来意义。said 为过去时,从句表示“那时将会”,应用 would bring。will/is going to 未后移;has 结构错误。

stem: In fact, his business ___ much better after the mall opened.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。after 从句 opened 为过去时,主句叙述结果动作用 became。becomes 现在时;has become 与明确过去时间搭配不当;was becoming 不强调结果完成。

stem: I knew the change ___ (be) good for us in the long run.
explanation: 考点:过去将来时。knew 是过去时,从句表示从过去看未来结果,故填 would be。

stem: Rex was ___ noisy to ignore.
explanation: 考点:too...to 结构。too + 形容词 + to do 表“太......而不能......”,故选 too。so/very/much 不能直接构成同样结构意义。

stem: She was patient enough ___ the door again.
explanation: 考点:enough...to 结构。形容词 + enough 后接 to do,故填 to open。open/opening/opened 结构都不完整。

stem: The gap was wide enough for the dog ___ through.
explanation: 考点:enough for sb to do。for the dog 后应接 to run through。其余选项不符合不定式结构。

stem: He was tired, but not ___ tired to walk the dog.
explanation: 考点:too...to 固定搭配。not too ... to ... 表“还不至于......不能......”,故选 too。so/such/enough 与后续结构不匹配。

stem: The room is warm enough ___ (sleep) in tonight.
explanation: 考点:enough...to。warm enough 后接不定式 to sleep,表示“足够暖可以睡”。

stem: The fortune-teller said, "You ___ meet a stranger soon."
explanation: 考点:直接引语中的一般将来时。算命先生当场预测未来,应用 will meet。would 常用于过去转述;are/have 结构错误。

stem: He told me that I ___ meet an important person.
explanation: 考点:过去将来时。told 为过去时,从句中 will 通常后移为 would,表示从过去看将来。will/am going to 未后移;have 结构错误。

stem: I didn't believe him, but I ___ a stranger that afternoon.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。that afternoon 提示过去具体时间,应用 met。meet 为原形;will meet 将来时;have met 与明确过去时间不搭配。

stem: She wondered if her life ___ change after that meeting.
explanation: 考点:过去将来时。wondered 为过去时,从句中“将会改变”应用 would change。will 未后移;is/has 时态结构不符。

stem: I think you ___ (have) good luck next month.
explanation: 考点:一般将来时。next month 表将来时间,应用 will have。
